content.en:
"The Truly Unholy Land has really become the target of public criticism. "

Ye Tian muttered.

If there is nothing to be gained from traveling through the timeline this timeline, then the True Immortal Land is indeed a big loss, but he must try it, otherwise it will take a long time for other Legendary Realm Lords of the True Immortal Land or if he wants to become the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Moreover, crossing the timeline is one of the abilities of the Eternal Master, you can try it in advance, and it is also what he wants~.

At this time.

The kite carried Ye Tian and other legendary realm lords tore through the long river of time, time began to distort, entered an unknown timeline, and disappeared.

"I can't perceive the existence of a replica body."

Ye Tian's body muttered.

At this moment, the replica body seemed to fall, but it did not fall, there was no past, no present, but the future.

The past has already happened, and it is almost impossible to change it. Unless the timeline of the entire Void Zone is reversed, and the entire Void Zone is reversed in time, the past cannot be repeated, and even if you cross the timeline of the past, you will only look at the past as a passerby, and you will not be able to change anything.

Therefore, Iris took Ye Tian and them mainly to the future.

"Hopefully there will be a big harvest this time. "

Ye Tian muttered.

The other legendary realms of the True Saintless Land are also secretly looking forward to it, hoping that there will be a big harvest this time.

If a peak Legendary Realm Lord can be born, then the True Immortal Land will not be afraid of everything, even if it is the Infinite Sea Immortal Lord, don't think about the Truly Immortal Realm.

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the Lords of the Legendary Realm are here.

Obviously, they were here to ask about the kites.

"Lord of the Word, Lord of the True Spirit, Lord of the Dragon, what is that treasure in your True Saintless Land?"

A Legendary Realm Lord asked.

"Iris, a treasure that can travel through the timeline, but it is almost useless after one use, it is a treasure that we found together with the Ice Lord, and the white-bearded old man also sent the Lord of the Shaking Mountain, everyone cooperates to shuttle the timeline and give it a try, and it is not sure to harvest. "

The Lord of the Dark Word suddenly moved out the two peak Legendary Realm Lords, the Ice Lord and the White Bearded Old Man, and immediately suppressed many Legendary Realm Lords.

Who would dare to offend the Peak Legendary Realm Lord?

They don't dare, so they only ask about it, and they don't say that they covet the treasures of the unholy land.

Soon, these Legendary Realm Lords departed

"The Lord of Blackwater didn't even jump out.

Lord Longgu was surprised.

Ye Tian said with a smile: "Even if the Lord of Blackwater hates us again, it is useless to jump out of the village, what can he do?" Of course, he will definitely repay the loss, as for how to retaliate, it is not clear, let's be careful." "

Yes, the Lord of Blackwater is nothing, but we are afraid that we have offended the Lord of Impermanence this time. The True Spirit Lord said.

When it came to the Lord of Impermanence, many Legendary Realm Lords had solemn faces.

Before that, they didn't think about Lord Wuheng, but Lord Wuheng's reputation was not good, and he was very domineering, if he cooperated with Lord Wuheng, Lord Wuheng had a high chance of directly occupying the three thousand iris and not cooperating with the True Holy Land.

If the True Sacred Land dares to resist, it may be directly suppressed.

It's not like this has not been done by Lord Wuheng.

Therefore, after weighing it, they definitely did not look for the Lord of Impermanence.

"Don't be afraid, although Lord Wuheng is domineering, he will not offend other peak Legendary Realm Lords, we have cooperated with the Ice River Lord and the White-bearded Old Man, Lord Wuheng will not attack us for no reason, but I am afraid that it will suppress us Really No Holy Land. "Lord of the Word said.

Lord Longgu said with a smile: "Suppress it, suppress it, the main thing is not that Lord Wuheng will deal with us, and other problems are not a problem." "

Many of the Legendary Realm Lords laughed one by one, not too worried, and the next thing was to wait for their clones to appear at some point in the future.

......

Going to the future timeline, there are no cut-off rules here, only the power of time is crossing.

If it weren't for the power of the kite to support them, even the peak Legendary Realm lords would have been shattered by time and turned into nothingness.

At this moment, Ye Tian sat on top of the iris and escaped into the future timeline, and in an instant, an ancient tree seemed to be between the past and the future.

"Ancient Tree of Time and Space!"

Ye Tian saw this legendary sacred tree, the ancient tree of time and space was extremely mysterious, and its ancient leaves of time and space were necessary to condense the supreme legend.

Not only did Ye Tian see the Ancient Tree of Time and Space, but other Legendary Realm Lords also saw it.

"It's an ancient tree of time and space, go over and take a look"

The Ice Lord also needs the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, which is useless now, but may be useful in the future.

Thereupon.

The Ice Lord manipulated the kite to go to the Ancient Tree of Time and Space, and instantly leaped over.

The kite surrounded the ancient tree of time and space, and everyone's eyes were staring at the ancient leaves of time and space.

Binghe touched the Ancient Tree of Time and Space with one hand, but in an instant, his hands turned into nothingness.

"No, you can't touch the Ancient Tree.

The Ice Lord said helplessly.

"The timeline does not allow the power outside of time, let's try it with the power of time, the pure power of time is billion," Ye Tian proposed.

"That's right. "

The Ice Lord felt that Ye Tian's proposal was very correct, this was a timeline across the future, he had just used the power of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, but it was not only the power of time, but also other powers, so it would be strange if it was not crushed.

....... コ0，

Thereupon.

The Ice Lord immediately used the pure power of time and turned into a hand of time, although it was suppressed and eroded by the power of the timeline this time, at least it could touch the ancient tree of time and space.

Wow!

A piece of the Ancient Leaf of Time and Space fell into the hands of the Ice Lord, but when the Ice Lord wanted to pick the second Ancient Leaf of Time and Space, a terrifying force spread from the Ancient Tree of Time and Space, directly shattering the Time Lord's hand of time.

"No, I can only get one. "

The Ice Lord gave up.

It's right to think about it, if they could take it casually, the Eternal Masters would have already taken all the Ancient Leaves of the Ancient Tree, and they wouldn't want to get the Ancient Leaves of Space-Time this time

Immediately, a famous Legendary Realm Lord gathered the hand of time to pick the ancient leaves of time and space.

Although their strength is far inferior to that of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, they are only the hand of time control and condensation time, and they are not too weak.

Whoa!!!

Pieces of space-time ancient leaves fell into their hands, but they also failed to obtain the second space-time ancient leaves.

"Let's go, continue to travel through the timeline, shuttle through the timeline, there is no concept of time, let's move on and try. "

The Ice Lord suggested.

"Glacier Lord, let's move on. "

Ye Tian and the other Legendary Realm lords nodded nine.
